data.name: Cinematic Short: A sterile fluorescent cubicle collapsing into a hy

inputs.prompt:
You are a film director planning a short film. Concept: "A sterile fluorescent cubicle collapsing into a hypnotic ocean of liquid neon and woven starlight, flowing upward through intense temporal shear and non-Euclidean geometric mutations". Mood: surreal and hypnotic.
Plan exactly 4 scenes. For each scene, write a vivid image generation prompt (2-3 sentences) describing the visual.
Output ONLY a JSON array of strings, one prompt per scene. Example: ["scene 1 prompt", "scene 2 prompt"]

inputs.description: surreal and hypnotic visual style for a short film about: A sterile fluorescent cubicle collapsing into a hypnotic ocean of liquid neon and woven starlight, flowing upward through intense temporal shear and non-Euclidean geometric mutations

data.workflowName: Cinematic Short: A sterile fluorescent cubicle collapsing into a hy

data.text:
[
  "A drab, sterile office cubicle illuminated by harsh, flickering fluorescent lights, with beige walls
and a solitary computer monitor. A mesmerizing puddle of glowing liquid neon begins to seep from a crack in the gray carpet,
defying gravity as it slowly crawls up the desk leg. The atmosphere feels tense yet hypnotically mundane, perfectly capturing the precipice of a surreal

transformation.",
  "The cubicle walls suddenly melt and warp into impossible, non-Euclidean geometric folds, dissolving
into a cascading waterfall of vibrant cyan and magenta liquid neon. Office supplies and floating keyboards disintegrate into glowing particles as the
rigid right angles of the room bend inward like a collapsing tesseract. The lighting shifts from sterile white to a deep,

pulsating bioluminescent glow that irresistibly pulls the viewer's eye upward.",
  "An endless, mesmerizing ocean of
liquid neon flows vertically upward, defying all laws of physics in a boundless surreal void. Glistening threads of woven starlight
intertwine with the upward-rushing neon waves, creating a hypnotic, luminescent tapestry of deep purples, electric
blues, and vibrant pinks. The perspective is completely disorienting, surrounded by fractal, shifting geometries that pulse with

a calming, otherworldly rhythm.",
  "A visually overwhelming climax of intense temporal shear, where ribbons of woven starlight
and liquid neon violently streak across a collapsing multi-dimensional space. The remnants of the office cubicle are now completely mutated
into a hypnotic kaleidoscope of shifting, non-Euclidean shapes that spiral infinitely upwards toward a blinding cosmic singularity. The entire

scene radiates an intensely surreal, dreamlike energy that appears to freeze time itself within a glowing, abstract cosmos."
]

template.promptTemplate: A cinematic short film still of a surreal environment where {{office_element}} is collapsing and transforming into an ocean of {{liquid_element}}, visually defined by {{geometric_mutation}} flowing upward through {{temporal_effect}}, captured with {{cinematography}}.

values.text: flickering fluorescent lights and beige partitions
stark white desks and endless drop ceilings
monotonous grey fabric walls and CRT monitors
soulless corporate workstations lined up symmetrically
liminal hallway aesthetics with buzzing lights
glowing liquid neon and woven starlight
shimmering pools of liquid chrome and mercury
hypnotic tides of glowing synthetic resin
fractal oceans of liquid glass and ether
impossible shifting colors out of space
intense temporal shear and motion blur
frozen reality with localized temporal rifts
deep depth of field with volumetric fog
8mm vintage film stock with heavy light leaks
